headline: Why Analysts Remain Bullish on Public Storage (PSA)
summary: Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) is among the 5 Most Profitable Real Estate Stocks Right Now. As reported by TheFly on March 23, Scotiabank lifted the price target on Public Storage (NYSE:PSA) to $321, up from $319, and reiterated an Outperform rating. This optimism comes after the earlier announcement of the $10.5 billion all-stock acquisition of National […]
